name: discord-agent-army
description: Scaffold and operate multiple isolated Discord communities with contract-governed AI agent teams and human approval gates.

interface.shortDescription: Contract-governed agents for multiple Discord servers
interface.longDescription: Create isolated Discord community instances, define agent autonomy and approval contracts, and manage a fleet with dry-run-first provisioning.
